metadata.description: Web/Wasm PWA UI automation flows via Playwright with recording at three speed modes (slow, normal, fast)

challenges.name: Web: PWA Launch in Chrome
challenges.description: Navigate to the Yole Wasm PWA URL in Chrome, verify the Wasm module initializes, the app shell renders, and the main UI becomes interactive within acceptable time bounds at each speed mode.

steps.description: Launch a Chromium browser instance via Playwright for the PWA test
Navigate to the Yole Wasm PWA URL and begin loading
Wait up to 15 seconds for the Wasm module to initialize and set the data-wasm-ready attribute
Verify the Compose app shell container is visible on the page
Verify the file browser panel is rendered inside the app shell
Verify the main editor area is rendered and ready for input
Verify the toolbar with action buttons is rendered at the top
Capture a full-page screenshot of the PWA after initial load
Confirm the Wasm runtime is fully initialized via DOM query
Verify the total page load time is under 15 seconds

outputs.name: pwa_loaded
outputs.description: Whether the PWA loaded in the browser

assertions.message: PWA must load in Chrome
Wasm module must initialize
UI must become interactive
PWA must load within 15 seconds

challenges.name: Web: File Browser Navigation
challenges.description: Navigate the file browser in the Web app: create a folder, enter it, go back, and verify the browser-based IndexedDB storage reflects the folder structure.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render after Wasm initialization
Click the file browser panel to give it focus
Click the 'New Folder' button to start folder creation
Type the folder name into the folder creation input field
Press Enter to confirm the new folder creation
Wait for the new folder to appear in the file browser listing
Verify the newly created folder is visible in the file listing
Click the new folder to navigate into it
Verify the URL updated to include the folder name for deep linking
Capture a screenshot while inside the newly created folder
Click the parent breadcrumb to navigate back to the parent directory
Verify the folder is still listed in the parent directory after navigation

outputs.name: folder_created
outputs.description: Whether the folder was created in IndexedDB

outputs.name: navigation_in
outputs.description: Whether navigating into the folder worked

assertions.message: Folder must be created in browser storage
Must navigate into folder
Must navigate back to parent

challenges.name: Web: Create Markdown Document
challenges.description: Create a new Markdown document in the browser, type content with headings, lists, and code blocks. Save to IndexedDB and verify persistence by refreshing the page.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render with all UI panels
Click the 'New File' button to open the file creation dialog
Type the filename with .md extension into the file creation input
Press Enter to confirm file creation and open the empty editor
Wait for the editor to become active with the new empty document

steps.target:
page.locator('[data-testid="editor"]').fill('# Web Document

Created in the **Wasm PWA**.

- Task one
- Task two

```js
console.log("Hello from Yole Web!");
```')
steps.description: Type the full Markdown content including heading, bold text, list, and code block
Click the Save button to persist the document to IndexedDB
Wait for the save indicator to confirm the document was written to IndexedDB
Capture a screenshot of the editor with the new Markdown content
Refresh the page by navigating to the app URL again to test persistence
Wait for the app shell to render after the refresh
Click the file in the file browser to reopen it after refresh
Verify the persisted content contains the heading after page refresh

outputs.name: content_saved
outputs.description: Whether content was saved to IndexedDB

assertions.message: File must be created in browser
Content must be saved to IndexedDB
Content must persist after page refresh

challenges.name: Web: Create Todo.txt Document
challenges.description: Create a todo.txt file in the Web app, enter prioritized tasks with projects and contexts, and verify parsing and rendering in the browser.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to fully render
Click the 'New File' button to open the file creation dialog
Type the filename 'web-tasks.todo' into the creation input
Press Enter to create the file and open the editor with todo.txt format
Wait for the editor to become active for the new todo.txt file

steps.target: page.locator('[data-testid="editor"]').fill('(A) Deploy web app +yole @ops due:2026-03-25\n(B) Fix responsive layout +yole @frontend\nx 2026-03-14 Set up PWA manifest +yole @web')
steps.description: Type three todo.txt tasks with priorities, projects, contexts, and a completed task
Click the Save button to persist the todo.txt to IndexedDB
Wait for the save indicator to confirm successful persistence
Verify priority (A) task is highlighted with the highest-priority styling
Verify priority (B) task is highlighted with medium-priority styling
Verify the +yole project tags are syntax-highlighted in the editor
Verify the completed task has strikethrough or dimmed styling
Capture a screenshot of the todo.txt editor with parsed and highlighted tasks

outputs.name: file_created
outputs.description: Whether the todo.txt file was created

assertions.message: Todo.txt file must be created
Tasks must be parsed with priorities and tags

challenges.name: Web: Edit Existing Document
challenges.description: Open an existing document in the Web app, modify content, save, and verify modifications are reflected in IndexedDB storage.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render after Wasm initialization
Click the test file in the file browser to open it in the editor
Wait for the file content to fully load in the editor area
Verify the editor contains the pre-existing document content
Capture a screenshot of the document before editing
Click the editor area to position the cursor for editing
Press End to move cursor to the end of the current line
Press Enter to start a new line at the cursor position

steps.target:
page.keyboard.type('
## Added by Web Automation

This section was appended by the Playwright test.')
steps.description: Type the new section content including a heading and paragraph
Click the Save button to persist the modifications to IndexedDB
Wait for the save indicator to confirm changes were written
Verify the editor contains the appended content after saving
Capture a screenshot of the document after editing

outputs.name: file_opened
outputs.description: Whether the file opened in editor

assertions.message: File must open in editor
Content must be editable
Changes must persist in IndexedDB

challenges.name: Web: Theme and Settings Changes
challenges.description: Switch themes (Light, Dark, System) and toggle settings in the Web app. Verify CSS custom properties change and settings persist via localStorage.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render with all navigation elements
Click the Settings navigation button to open the settings panel
Verify the settings panel with theme options is visible
Click the theme selector dropdown to expand theme options
Select the Dark theme from the dropdown options
Wait for the CSS custom property --color-bg to update to the dark theme value
Verify the --color-bg CSS variable reflects the dark theme color
Capture a screenshot of the app with Dark theme applied
Click the theme selector dropdown again to switch themes
Select the Light theme from the dropdown options
Wait 300ms for the CSS theme transition to complete
Verify the --color-bg CSS variable reflects the light theme color
Capture a screenshot of the app with Light theme applied
Verify the selected theme was persisted to localStorage as 'light'

outputs.name: dark_theme_applied
outputs.description: Whether dark theme changed CSS variables

outputs.name: light_theme_applied
outputs.description: Whether light theme changed CSS variables

outputs.name: theme_persisted
outputs.description: Whether theme choice was saved to localStorage

assertions.message: Dark theme must change CSS custom properties
Light theme must change CSS custom properties
Theme choice must persist in localStorage

challenges.name: Web: Navigation Through All Routes
challenges.description: Navigate to all top-level routes in the Web app (Files, Todo, QuickNote, Settings) and verify each view renders correctly with proper URL routing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render with navigation elements
Click the 'Files' navigation link to navigate to the files route
Verify the file browser panel is displayed on the Files route
Verify the browser URL contains the /files path segment
Capture a screenshot of the Files route view
Click the 'Todo' navigation link to navigate to the todo route
Wait for the Todo list panel to render
Verify the Todo task list is displayed
Verify the browser URL contains the /todo path segment
Click the 'QuickNote' navigation link to navigate to the quicknote route
Wait for the QuickNote editor to render
Verify the QuickNote editor is displayed
Verify the browser URL contains the /quicknote path segment
Click the 'Settings' navigation link to navigate to the settings route
Wait for the Settings panel to render
Verify the Settings panel is displayed with configuration options
Verify the browser URL contains the /settings path segment

assertions.message: Files route must render and update URL
Todo route must render and update URL
QuickNote route must render and update URL
Settings route must render and update URL

challenges.name: Web: Responsive Layout - Mobile Viewport
challenges.description: Set the browser viewport to mobile dimensions (375x667), verify the layout adapts with a hamburger menu, stacked panels, and touch-friendly button sizes.

steps.description: Set the Playwright viewport to iPhone SE mobile dimensions (375x667)
Navigate to the Yole web app at the mobile viewport size
Wait for the app shell to render in mobile layout mode
Capture a full-page screenshot showing the mobile responsive layout
Verify the hamburger menu icon appeared (replacing the full sidebar)
Verify the sidebar panel is hidden/collapsed in mobile layout
Tap the hamburger menu to open the mobile navigation drawer
Wait for the mobile navigation drawer to slide into view
Verify the mobile navigation drawer is visible with navigation links
Capture a screenshot with the mobile navigation drawer open
Verify the editor width does not exceed the mobile viewport width of 375px

assertions.message: Mobile layout must activate at 375px width
Hamburger menu must be visible
Sidebar must collapse on mobile
Mobile nav drawer must open on tap

challenges.name: Web: Responsive Layout - Tablet Viewport
challenges.description: Set the browser viewport to tablet dimensions (768x1024), verify the layout adapts with a collapsible sidebar and appropriate panel sizing.

steps.description: Set the Playwright viewport to iPad portrait dimensions (768x1024)
Navigate to the Yole web app at the tablet viewport size
Wait for the app shell to render in tablet layout mode
Capture a full-page screenshot showing the tablet responsive layout
Verify the editor area is visible and occupies the main content area
Verify the editor area has at least 400px of width on tablet layout
Click the sidebar toggle button to expand the collapsible sidebar
Wait for the file browser sidebar to expand into view
Verify the file browser panel is visible after toggling the sidebar
Capture a screenshot of the tablet layout with sidebar expanded

outputs.name: editor_sized_correctly
outputs.description: Whether editor area used sufficient width

assertions.message: Tablet layout must render at 768px width
Editor must have at least 400px width on tablet
Sidebar must be toggleable on tablet

challenges.name: Web: Responsive Layout - Desktop Viewport
challenges.description: Set the browser viewport to desktop dimensions (1920x1080), verify the full two-panel layout with sidebar and editor renders at full width.

steps.description: Set the Playwright viewport to full HD desktop dimensions (1920x1080)
Navigate to the Yole web app at the desktop viewport size
Wait for the app shell to render in full desktop layout mode
Capture a full-page screenshot showing the full desktop layout
Verify the file browser sidebar is permanently visible at desktop width
Verify the editor area is visible alongside the sidebar
Verify the toolbar is visible at the top of the editor area
Verify the file browser sidebar has at least 200px of width
Verify the editor area uses the remaining viewport width (at least 800px)

assertions.message: Full desktop layout must render at 1920px
Sidebar must be permanently visible on desktop
Editor must use remaining viewport width

challenges.name: Web: Offline Mode (Service Worker)
challenges.description: Load the PWA, go offline by disabling network via Playwright, verify the app continues to function for local file operations, then re-enable network and verify sync.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole PWA and wait for full initial load
Wait for the app shell to render and the service worker to register
Verify the service worker is registered and in the 'ready' state
Capture a screenshot of the app in online state before going offline
Disable network via Playwright's browser context to simulate offline mode
Click 'New File' to test file creation while offline
Type the filename for the offline-created document
Press Enter to create the file while in offline mode
Type content into the editor while the network is disabled
Click Save to persist the content to IndexedDB while offline
Verify the offline indicator is displayed in the app UI
Capture a screenshot showing the app functioning in offline mode
Re-enable network via Playwright to bring the app back online
Wait for the online indicator to appear, confirming network recovery

outputs.name: online_recovery
outputs.description: Whether app recovered when network restored

assertions.message: Service worker must be registered
File creation must work offline
Saving must work offline via IndexedDB
App must recover when network is restored

challenges.name: Web: Preview Mode Toggle
challenges.description: Open a Markdown document in the Web app, switch between editor and preview modes. Verify HTML rendering in preview and content integrity when switching back.

steps.description: Navigate to the Yole web app URL
Wait for the app shell to render
Click the test Markdown file in the file browser to open it
Wait for the file content to fully load in the editor area
Verify the editor shows raw Markdown source text with # symbols
Capture a screenshot of the editor mode showing raw Markdown source
Click the Preview button to switch to the rendered HTML view
Wait for the preview area to render the Markdown as HTML
Verify the preview HTML output contains an <h1> tag for the heading
Verify the preview HTML contains <strong> tags for bold text
Capture a screenshot of the preview mode showing rendered HTML
Click the Editor button to switch back to raw Markdown editing mode
Wait for the editor area to reappear with the source content
Verify the editor content is intact with the original Markdown after the round-trip

assertions.message: Preview must render formatted HTML
HTML must contain expected structural tags
Editor content must be intact after preview round-trip
